    Categories: Diamond shape Rings,   Emerald Shape Rings,   Gemstone Rings,   Halo rings,   Promise rings,   Rakhi Gift for Sister,   Rings,   Rings between Rs.10000 to Rs.20000,   Rings for wife,   Shop All,   Statement Wear,   The Party Edit

    Lab-grown diamonds are real diamonds with the same chemical and optical properties as earth-mined ones — environmentally friendly, ethical, and cost-effective. No mining, no harm; just brilliance.

    Inspired by the beauty of midnight, Emori crafted a breathtaking ring to indulge you in an unmatched sparkle. Introducing the Blue Saphire Diamond Ring. The glorious ring features a vibrant blue sapphire in the heart of the ring surrounded by small 0.35 CT round cut lab-grown diamonds. The mesmerizing pattern is settled on a luminous white gold band engraved with shimmering diamonds, adding a perfect allure to the enchanting piece. The deep blue hue signifies deep loyalty perfect for expressing love to someone special.

    Returns & Refunds:

    We offer 30 day free return with 100% refund. No questions asked!

    It usually takes between 7-14 business working days for the amount to reflect in your original source of payment post the product has been received by us.

    Shipping:

    For domestic orders within India, we offer standard shipping which typically takes 14-21 business days to arrive. Currently, we do not offer international shipping.

    Above policy is not applicable on Gold coins.

    Type of diamond used?

    Lab Grown Diamonds

    Is the product unisex?

    No

    What ring sizes are available?

    Sizes 5-26; Any size not available online can be customized.

    Is there rhodium on the tips?

    Yes

    Product Finish

    High Polish

    Does the product cost include GST?

    Yes

    What % of GST is applicable on the product?

    3

    Does the product cost include shipping?

    Yes

    Does the product cost include product discounts?

    Yes. However, any applicable coupon can be applied at the time of payment.

    Are there any other hidden costs?

    No there are no hidden costs or additional charges.

    Is there a price breakup available for the product price?

    Yes, same is available in the price break-up section.

    Is the gold BIS hallmarked?

    Yes

    Is jewellery certification provided?

    Yes

    Type of jewellery certification

    IGI for 1+ carat diamonds, SGL for other diamonds

    What can be done if I lose my jewellery certificate?

    A duplicate certificate can be arranged for you for INR 2000-4000 (depending on the diamond weight). The product will need to be sent back to the lab for this. It will come with copy/duplicate written across the certificate as a watermark.

    How to identify if my product is authentic?

    You can check for the hallmark- 6 digit HUID code engraved on the product. And cross check the report number mentioned on the given diamond certificate on the laboratory's website for authentication.

    Where can I find the BIS hallmarking on the product?

    Inside of the ring

    Is the product moisture resistant?

    Yes

    Is the product heat resistant?

    Yes

    Is the product dirt resistant?

    No, but it can be easily cleaned at any local store.

    Is the product scratch proof?

    No, gold surface is prone to scratches. However, scratches can be eliminated through repolishing periodically.

    Is the jewellery product kids friendly?

    Yes, for age above 5 years.

    Is the jewellery product senior citizen friendly?

    Yes

    Is free shipping option available?

    Yes

    Is lifetime exchange available?

    Yes

    Is return available?

    Yes, all our website products are covered under 30 day free return. Some custom products may not be under 30 day free return.

    Will the diamond fade over a period of time?

    No

    How safe is my jewellery shipping?

    Your jewellery is shipped in durable, tamper-proof packing that ensures that the products remain intact. Your jewellery is fully insured till it reaches your doorstep, and we only work with reputed and established courier services.

    Is my jewellery insured for transit?

    Yes

    Which delivery partner do you use?

    Sequel Logistics, Vamaship, BlueDart

    Is the reverse shipping paid by EMORI in case of return?

    Yes

    What mode of payments are available?

    UPI/ Credit Card/ Debit Card/ Net Banking/ Bank transfer

    Is cash on delivery option available?

    No

    Can I purchase on EMI?

    Currently we do not provide any EMI option.

    Can I pay in cash?

    No, we do not take cash currently. However, you can avail any other payment method available.

    Do you have partial payment option?

    For high value items, we can understand that paying all at once can be a challenge. You can contact our customer support team on care@emori.in and +91-8826866811.

    Are there any points given on purchasing jewellery?

    No, but you get an exclusive discount code for the next purchase post order.

    Occasion type

    Statement wear

    Pairing tips

    Style this ring with a ethnic dress paired with heels

    Can this be worn as a stackable ring?

    No

    Is customization available for this product?

    Yes

    Is gold karatage customization available?

    Yes

    Can gold colour of a product be customized to another gold colour?

    Yes

    What all diamond colour customizations are available?

    D/E/F/G

    What all diamond clarity customizations are available?

    VVS/VS

    Can I order a ring/bracelet in a size that is not offered on the website?

    Yes

    Can the thickness of the ring be customized?

    Yes

    Can I engrave my ring?

    Yes. Custom engraving is available. Engraved products do not qualify under 30 day free return.

    Can this product be made in Platinum?

    Yes

    Is repair provided?

    Yes, we provied free repair in case of any manufacturing issue within the 30 day period post delivery. After that, repairs are dealt on case to case basis but rest assured, at EMORI, we will always help you solve for every problem.

    Can this product be used as a gift?

    Yes

    Is gift wrap available?

    Yes, on demand.

    Can I get a gift card?

    Yes, on demand and it will be chargeable.

    What does the packaging include?

    Your packaging box will contain the Jewellery piece, LED light box, Thank You card, SGL/IGI product certificates and the product invoice.

    Type of Jewellery box provided?

    LED light box

    Can the packaging box color be customized?

    No. Currently EMORI branded boxes are available only in 1 color.

    How frequent should we get the jewellery repolished?

    6-12 months

    When should I remove my jewellery in everyday routine?

    While taking a shower, exercising, during household chores, or any physical activity that may hamper the shape/ texture of the product.

    What methods can be used to clean jewellery?

    Microfibre cloth, professional cleaning, soap and warm water, soft brush, jewellery cleanser, jewellery wipes, jewellery cleaning solution kit, etc. can be used.

    How to store my jewellery?

    Place them in a box lined with fabric, away from moisture.

    How can we increase the life of the jewellery?

    Keep the jewellery pieces in separate boxes to avoid scratches. Store them away from moisture and avoid contact with perfumes/ lotion/ other chemicals/ sweat. Remove while doing household chores, exercising, swimming and showering. Get the jewellery cleaned professionally from time to time.

    439 reviews on
    AI Summary
    Based on 439 reviews

    Exceptional Customer Service: Many reviews highlight the outstanding support from staff members, particularly Ritika, who guided customers through the purchasing process with patience and expertise;

    High-Quality Products and Presentation: Customers appreciate the top-notch quality of the diamond jewelry and the elegant packaging, including back-lit boxes that enhance the presentation of the rings;

    Ethical and Affordable Options: Reviewers commend Emori for offering lab-grown diamonds that are both eco-friendly and reasonably priced, making it an attractive choice for ethical consumers.

    Show more
    AI Summary
    Based on 439 reviews
    Dipti shetty
    2 months ago
    Powered by
    Verified
    I had a truly beautiful experience with EMORI, right from my very first interaction till the solitaire was delivered to my home. I was assisted by Ritika ( Gurgaon branch) and I must say her support made the entire journey smooth and reassuring. From patiently helping me select the right design, guiding me with clarity, ensuring I got the best possible offer, to keeping everything seamless till dispatch , every step felt thoughtfully handled. What really stood out was the presentation of the ring. The lit box, the elegance of the packaging, and the attention to detail were simply lovely. The documentation included is very well-organised, and I especially appreciated the brochure — it’s informative and genuinely helpful for clients to understand their jewellery better. Overall, the experience felt premium, transparent, and warm — not transactional at all. I’m extremely happy with my purchase and would highly recommend EMORI to anyone looking for a thoughtful, well-guided solitaire / Diamond jewelry buying experience. Love, Dipti Shetty
    Show more

    Vaishali Chakraborty
    2 months ago
    Powered by
    Verified
    I was confused and concerned initially on what brand to go, whether to buy lab grown diamonds or not. After some research I went ahead with Emori - they have a great online presence and offline store in Gurgaon. I bought 2 earrings - one small studs for multipierce and diamond studs - their customer service, delivery, packaging (back lit boxes) quality of the product is top notch. They have mentioned converted on lab grown diamonds - reasonable & eco friendly less carbon footprint - your little contribution to a better environment ♻️ 100% trust the brand & must buy. A special shout out to Ritika who helped me with any questions or concerns. This brand will be my go to & will convert my mother soon - can't wait for the next one to arrive 💟 They will be opening a store in Bangalore soon.

    I think their designs and quality of product is top notch. I customised one of their designs to my liking and the customer service including response and level of details is really commendable. They have these nice back-lit boxes for their rings which I think is a very nice idea and makes the product look even more stunning. The other big thing i like is that their prices are very reasonable compared to some other lab diamond stores i have spoken to. Very happy and will definitely recommend to everyone I know.

    Emori has earned a special place in my heart as they brought immense happiness to my significant other and huge satisfaction to me as a buyer. The team at emori and specially arushi is very professional and supportive in answering to each and every question I had. I had shared a customised design with them which needed a lot of intricate details and craftsmanship to be made in a proper way. Within a couple of days, their team provided with us with 2 different CAD designs. When I received the ring, I was just dumbstruck with the beauty and the sparkle it offered. It was stunning! ✨ The ring was so beautiful that it made me confident that my partner would absolutely love it and it made me less nervous since I was planning a surprise proposal. 💍 I would recommend each and everyone to buy their jewellery from them. Their attention to detail and also the price point is just unbelievable. ❤️

    I recently purchased a diamond ring from Emori, and I couldn’t be happier with my experience. The ring is absolutely flawless and stunningly beautiful. The craftsmanship is top-notch, and it truly exceeded my expectations. What made the experience even more delightful was the exceptional customer service. The team at Emori was incredibly helpful and attentive throughout the entire process. They patiently answered all my questions and ensured that I was completely satisfied with my purchase. Overall, buying from Emori was a wonderful experience, and I highly recommend them to anyone looking for high-quality jewellery and excellent service.
    Show more
